THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHANG, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHANG, GERARD A.K.A. GERARDO BENITO CHANG CALDERON $62,459.50 PRINCIPAL, $1,884.77 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $64,344.27, TEMPORARY INJUNCTIVE RELIEF PREVIOUSLY GRANTED PENDING JUDGMENT SHALL CONTINUE AFTER JUDGMENT UNTIL FURTHER ORDER OF THE COURT WHICH WILL RETAIN CONTINUING JURISDICTION. SO LONG AS DEFENDANT GERARD CHANG REMAINS IN DEFAULT ON HIS OBLIGATIONS, EITHER PAST OR CURRENT, HE SHALL NOT OCCUPY ANY PART OF 584, 586 OR 588 SANCHEZ STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, OR PARTICIPATE IN MANAGEMENT OF SUCH PROPERTIES OR INTERFERE WITH PLAINTIFF WILLIAM CHANG'S POSSESSION, OPERATION AND MANAGEMENT OF SUCH PROPERTIES. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM CHANG IS THE PREVAILING PARTY IN THIS ACTON AND MAY RECOVER COSTS IN SUCH AMOUNT AS MAY BE SUBSEQUENTLY FIXED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
